title: Applied Proteomics in 'One Health'.
author: Katsarou EI Billinis C Galamatis D Fthenakis GC Tsangaris GT Katsafadou AI
content: S-EPMC8293331 PMC8293331 Applied Proteomics in 'One Health'. 'One Health' summarises the idea that human health and animal health are interdependent and bound to the health of ecosystems. The purpose of proteomics methodologies and studies is to determine proteins present in samples of interest
